title: Family Group Chat
drDigitalIntro: You're organizing a family vacation and need to coordinate with relatives. Your task is to create a group chat, reply to messages, send a photo, add reactions to messages, and answer a FaceTime call from a family member. During the FaceTime call, you'll mute your microphone and turn off your camera as requested. This is how families really use Messages and FaceTime!
drDigitalSuccess: You coordinated a family event using Messages and FaceTime!
drDigitalHint: Start with a group message, then handle the FaceTime call.
